calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-06-2006 Off Calendar

Minors' Compromise In Scd (2).
Off Calendar Jun-22-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Lawrence Mann, Esq. for Petitioner: Charleen wignall, present as Guardian at litem for: Charles Ewing and Edward Ewing, minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, each of the Petition is granted and each compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $1,826.20
Costs $194.72
Each net balance of $5,478.58 to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, 1107 Main St., Helena, CA. 94574, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim and Orders to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-01-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minors' Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Angie Diner.
Lawrence Mann, Esq. for Petitioner: Charleen Wignall, present as Guardian at litem for: Edward Ewing and Charles Ewing, minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.
Only one Petition filed as to both Minors, matter is ordered off-calendar.
